'''shangomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachwhipping|coachwhipping]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachwhipping|coachwhipping]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shangomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shængemeth|shængemeth]] || [[word:shængemej|shængemej]] || [[word:shængemesh|shængemesh]] || [[word:shængeme|shængeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shangongomoth|shangongomoth]] || [[word:shangongomoj|shangongomoj]] || [[word:shangongomosh|shangongomosh]] || [[word:shangongomo|shangongomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shangomoth|shangomoth]] || [[word:shangomoj|shangomoj]] || [[word:shangomosh|shangomosh]] || [[word:shangomo|shangomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shangofmoth|shangofmoth]] || [[word:shangofmoj|shangofmoj]] || [[word:shangofmosh|shangofmosh]] || [[word:shangofmof|shangofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shangomotho|shangomotho]] || [[word:shangomojo|shangomojo]] || [[word:shangomosho|shangomosho]] || [[word:shangomoko|shangomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shangomoth|shangomoth]] || [[word:shangomoj|shangomoj]] || [[word:shangomosh|shangomosh]] || [[word:shangomo|shangomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shangomothol|shangomothol]] || [[word:shangomojol|shangomojol]] || [[word:shangomoshol|shangomoshol]] || [[word:shangomokol|shangomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shangomothotho|shangomothotho]] || [[word:shangomojojo|shangomojojo]] || [[word:shangomoshosho|shangomoshosho]] || [[word:shangomoko|shangomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shangomothon|shangomothon]] || [[word:shangomojon|shangomojon]] || [[word:shangomoshon|shangomoshon]] || [[word:shangomokon|shangomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shangomothoro|shangomothoro]] || [[word:shangomojoro|shangomojoro]] || [[word:shangomoshoro|shangomoshoro]] || [[word:shangomokoro|shangomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
